title: Vegetables Are Plotting Against Me
lyrics:
[verse]
The broccoli is watching me
I swear I saw it move
The carrots formed a circle
And they're planning something rude

[chorus]
The vegetables are plotting against me
They're hiding in my dinner every night
The vegetables are plotting against me
I know it, I know it, I'm right

[verse]
The peas are rolling closer
In a tiny little line
The beans are whispering secrets
And they're definitely not fine

[chorus]
The vegetables are plotting against me
They're hiding in my dinner every night
The vegetables are plotting against me
I know it, I know it, I'm right

[bridge]
Mama says they're good for me
Mama says they'll make me strong
But if they're so good
Then why do they taste so wrong

[chorus]
The vegetables are plotting against me
They're hiding in my dinner every night
The vegetables are plotting against me
I know it, I know it...
Goodnight, broccoli
I'll deal with you tomorrow
style_prompt: children's song, dramatic pop, piano, strings, building drums, 115 BPM, expressive young vocal, starts suspicious and builds to dramatic accusation, funny paranoia, like a detective movie about broccoli, energetic and theatrical
cover_description: A wide-eyed child at a dinner table staring suspiciously at a plate of vegetables, the broccoli and carrots have tiny cartoon eyes looking back menacingly, dramatic spotlight on the plate, the peas forming a tiny marching line
